hero.title: MiaoMiaoWu
hero.description:
Supports 12+ mainstream proxy clients with one-click subscription generation.
Node management, traffic statistics, chain proxy, custom rules — all in one.

features.title: Core Features
features.description: MiaoMiaoWu provides a complete proxy subscription management solution for various use cases

multiClient.title: Multi-Client Support
multiClient.desc: Supports 12+ mainstream proxy clients including Clash, Surge, Shadowrocket, Loon, QuantumultX, etc.

nodeManagement.title: Node Management
nodeManagement.desc: Supports multiple protocols like SS, SSR, VMess, VLESS, Trojan, Hysteria2, AnyTLS, with batch import/export.

subscriptionGen.title: Subscription Generation
subscriptionGen.desc: One-click subscription link generation with custom rules, node filtering, sorting and other advanced features.

chainProxy.title: Chain Proxy
chainProxy.desc: Multi-layer proxy forwarding for transit acceleration, improving connection quality and privacy.

trafficStats.title: Traffic Statistics
trafficStats.desc: Integrated probe system with accurate per-node traffic statistics and visual chart display.

customRules.title: Custom Rules
customRules.desc: Custom DNS, routing rules, and rule sets for flexible proxy policy configuration.

multiUser.title: Multi-User Management
multiUser.desc: Multi-user system where each user gets independent subscription configuration and node permissions.

externalSub.title: External Subscriptions
externalSub.desc: Import airport subscription links with automatic node sync and scheduled updates.

templates.title: Template System
templates.desc: Built-in configuration templates with custom template support for professional subscription configs.

security.title: Secure & Reliable
security.desc: Local data storage with backup/restore, no third-party dependencies — full control of your data.

probe.title: Probe Monitoring
probe.desc: Real-time node status and traffic monitoring with multi-probe aggregation for comprehensive network awareness.

flexible.title: Flexible Deployment
flexible.desc: Docker one-click deployment with multiple deployment methods and rich system configuration options.

clients.title: Supported Clients
clients.description: One subscription, compatible with all mainstream proxy clients — no tedious conversion
clients.protocols: Supports SS, SSR, VMess, VLESS, Trojan, Hysteria, Hysteria2, AnyTLS, TUIC, WireGuard and more

demo.title: Feature Demo
demo.description: Interactive experience of MiaoMiaoWu's core features — understand system operations without installation

footer.brandDesc: A simple and efficient proxy subscription management platform supporting 12+ mainstream proxy clients with one-click subscription generation.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.subtitle: Recording every growth and progress of MiaoMiaoWu
changelog.viewOnGithub: View full release history on GitHub
changelog.historyStart: This is where it all began...
changelog.footerDesc: MiaoMiaoWu - Simple and efficient proxy subscription management platform

xHome.description:
Master-Agent architecture for centralized remote server management. Visual Xray inbound configuration,
19 protocol combinations (now including AnyTLS), automated certificate management, and automatic node sync.
xHome.coreCapabilitiesDesc: Building on MiaoMiaoWu with complete remote server management and Xray configuration capabilities

remoteServer.title: Remote Server Management
remoteServer.desc: Master-Agent architecture with WebSocket/HTTP/Pull modes for managing remote servers. Auto-reconnect, token rotation, and status monitoring.

xrayInbound.title: Xray Inbound Management
xrayInbound.desc: Visual inbound wizard supporting VLESS/VMess/Trojan/SS/Hysteria2/AnyTLS, 19 protocol combinations with one-click configuration

reality.title: REALITY Support
reality.desc: No domain or certificate needed, auto-generates X25519 key pairs, strongest anti-detection capability

certificates.title: Certificate Management
certificates.desc: ACME auto-apply and renew TLS certificates, supports Cloudflare/Alibaba Cloud/Tencent Cloud DNS providers

trafficMonitor.title: Traffic Monitoring
trafficMonitor.desc: Real-time Xray traffic data collection, per-user/node statistics, visual chart display

userPackage.title: Users & Packages
userPackage.desc: Multi-user management, package quota control, subscription token distribution, monthly traffic reset

autoSync.title: Auto Node Sync
autoSync.desc: Inbound changes automatically trigger node sync, event-bus driven, zero manual operation

xHome.quickNavDesc: Start exploring MiaoMiaoWu X from here
xHome.footerDesc: MiaoMiaoWu X — Multi-Server Xray Management & Subscription Platform

trafficDemo.heading: Traffic insights at a glance
trafficDemo.description: The admin home page shows the whole picture: live speed dial, drill from users into per-node usage and vice versa, plus a server quota overview at the bottom. The widget below uses mock data.
trafficDemo.userViewDesc: Sorted by cycle usage; click a user to see per-node breakdown
trafficDemo.nodeViewDesc: Sorted by cycle usage; click a node to see per-user breakdown
trafficDemo.serverViewDesc: Each server's live speed / used / total / remaining / usage rate

screenshotsWall.heading: Feature screenshots
screenshotsWall.description: From node management to the Telegram Mini App — every piece of UI gets the same polish.

nodes.title: Node Management
nodes.desc: Inbound nodes grouped by server; batch edit / toggle / sync

servers.title: Server Management
servers.desc: Servers as cards with status / live speed / traffic / Xray actions

createPackage.title: Create Package
createPackage.desc: Parameters on the left + node selection on the right; supports per-node multipliers and reset cycles

miniapp.title: TG Bot Mini App
miniapp.desc: Admin view (left) & user view (right), full phone resolution
